page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is a compute-oriented virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data.

Benchmark data indicates a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by stress-ng single-core and single-threaded compression tests falling into the bottom tiers. However, the 32 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance in stress-ng and bzip3 decompression benchmarks. Memory bandwidth remains stable in the middle tier for both small cached and large uncached read/write operations.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance offers a cost-efficient profile for parallelized workloads that do not require massive per-core memory allocations. It is suited for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, Redis key-value databases, and general-purpose batch processing where multi-core scaling can offset the lower single-thread execution speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is a compute-oriented virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores on an x86_64 architecture, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks reveal a trade-off: single-core execution and single-threaded compression speeds are weak, but multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform at average levels. With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, it provides a cost-efficient platform for parallelized workloads. It is best suited for multi-threaded batch processing, static web serving, and distributed caching.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge is a KVM-based instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM. It offers average multi-core performance and is designed for parallelized workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n1.7xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM, offering balanced multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core compute instance designed for parallelized processing, static web serving, and distributed caching workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with zero local storage

Suited for multi-threaded batch processing, Redis, and web serving
